back.example_hindi: कवि ने अपने दिवंगत मित्र के लिए एक मार्मिक शोकगीत लिखा।

back.definition_eng: A person who is able to have/do something because he has the right qualifications, is the right age, etc.
back.example_eng: You must be 18 or older to be eligible to vote.
back.example_hindi: मतदान के योग्य होने के लिए आपकी आयु 18 वर्ष या उससे अधिक होनी चाहिए।

back.definition_eng: Freeing someone from the control of another.
back.example_eng: The Emancipation Proclamation was a key moment in the fight against slavery.
back.example_hindi: मुक्ति उद्घोषणा गुलामी के खिलाफ लड़ाई में एक महत्वपूर्ण क्षण था।

back.definition_eng: The act of stealing money that you are responsible for or that belongs to your employer.
back.example_eng: The accountant was charged with embezzlement of company funds.
back.example_hindi: लेखाकार पर कंपनी के धन के गबन का आरोप लगाया गया था।

back.definition_eng: One who is honorably discharged from service.
back.example_eng: The professor emeritus continued to advise students even after his official retirement.
back.example_hindi: अवकाश प्राप्त प्रोफेसर अपनी आधिकारिक सेवानिवृत्ति के बाद भी छात्रों को सलाह देते रहे।

back.definition_eng: A person who leaves his country to live in another.
back.example_eng: Many emigrants from Ireland moved to the United States in the 19th century.
back.example_hindi: 19वीं सदी में आयरलैंड से कई उत्प्रवासी संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका चले गए।

back.definition_eng: A person who is sent to deliver an official message from one country to another or to perform a special task.
back.example_eng: The king sent an emissary to negotiate a peace treaty.
back.example_hindi: राजा ने शांति संधि पर बातचीत करने के लिए एक दूत भेजा।

back.definition_eng: The ability to understand another person's feelings, experience, etc.
back.example_eng: Having empathy for others is a key component of emotional intelligence.
back.example_hindi: दूसरों के प्रति समवेदना रखना भावनात्मक बुद्धिमत्ता का एक प्रमुख घटक है।

back.definition_eng: Regularly found in a particular place or among a particular group of people and difficult to get rid of.
back.example_eng: This rare bird is endemic to a small island in the Pacific.
back.example_hindi: यह दुर्लभ पक्षी प्रशांत महासागर के एक छोटे से द्वीप के लिए स्थानिक है।

back.definition_eng: A state of mental weariness from lack of occupation.
back.example_eng: A sense of ennui filled his days after he retired from his busy job.
back.example_hindi: अपनी व्यस्त नौकरी से सेवानिवृत्त होने के बाद उसके दिनों में विरक्ति की भावना भर गई।

back.definition_eng: A zoologist (person) who studies insects.
back.example_eng: The entomologist identified a new species of beetle in the rainforest.
back.example_hindi: कीटविज्ञानी ने वर्षावन में बीटल की एक नई प्रजाति की पहचान की।

back.definition_eng: The scientific study of insects.
back.example_eng: His fascination with bugs led him to pursue a degree in entomology.
back.example_hindi: कीड़ों के प्रति उसके आकर्षण ने उसे कीटविज्ञान में डिग्री हासिल करने के लिए प्रेरित किया।

back.definition_eng: Feeling of discontented aroused by someone else's possessions or qualities.
back.example_eng: He was envious of his friend's new car.
back.example_hindi: वह अपने दोस्त की नई कार से ईर्ष्या करता था।

back.definition_eng: Lasting/ used for only a short period of time.
back.example_eng: The beauty of the cherry blossoms is ephemeral, lasting only a week.
back.example_hindi: चेरी ब्लॉसम की सुंदरता क्षणिक होती है, जो केवल एक सप्ताह तक रहती है।

back.definition_eng: A person who enjoys food and drink of high quality and knows a lot about it.
back.example_eng: The epicure traveled the world to taste the finest cuisines.
back.example_hindi: भोग-विलासी ने बेहतरीन व्यंजनों का स्वाद लेने के लिए दुनिया की यात्रा की।

back.definition_eng: A large number of cases of a particular disease happening at the same time in a particular community.
back.example_eng: The government took swift action to control the flu epidemic.
back.example_hindi: सरकार ने फ्लू महामारी को नियंत्रित करने के लिए तेजी से कार्रवाई की।

back.definition_eng: A short poem/ phrase that expresses an idea in a clever/amusing way.
back.example_eng: Oscar Wilde was famous for his witty epigrams.
back.example_hindi: ऑस्कर वाइल्ड अपने मजाकिया चुटकुलों के लिए प्रसिद्ध थे।

back.definition_eng: An engraved inscription.
back.example_eng: The epigraph on the monument honored the fallen soldiers.
back.example_hindi: स्मारक पर शिलालेख ने शहीद सैनिकों को सम्मानित किया।

back.definition_eng: A speech at the end of a play, book, or film/movie that comments on or acts as a conclusion to what has happened.
back.example_eng: The epilogue revealed that the hero went on to live a quiet and happy life.
back.example_hindi: उपसंहार में पता चला कि नायक ने आगे एक शांत और सुखी जीवन व्यतीत किया।

back.definition_eng: An inscription on a tombstone.
back.example_eng: The soldier's epitaph read, 'A life given for his country'.
back.example_hindi: सैनिक के समाधि-लेख पर लिखा था, 'देश के लिए दिया गया जीवन'।

back.definition_eng: A person or thing that is a perfect example of a particular quality or type.
back.example_eng: With his kindness and generosity, he was the epitome of a true gentleman.
back.example_hindi: अपनी दया और उदारता के साथ, वह एक सच्चे सज्जन का प्रतीक था।

back.definition_eng: Continuing forever.
back.example_eng: Many religions speak of an eternal life after death.
back.example_hindi: कई धर्म मृत्यु के बाद एक सनातन जीवन की बात करते हैं।

back.definition_eng: The scientific study and comparison of human races.
back.example_eng: Ethnology compares the cultural practices of different societies.
back.example_hindi: मानव जाति विज्ञान विभिन्न समाजों की सांस्कृतिक प्रथाओं की तुलना करता है।

back.definition_eng: The study of the origin and history of words and their meanings.
back.example_eng: Studying etymology can help you understand the deeper meaning of words.
back.example_hindi: शब्द-व्युत्पत्ति का अध्ययन आपको शब्दों के गहरे अर्थ को समझने में मदद कर सकता है।

back.definition_eng: A speech/piece of writing praising somebody/something very much.
back.example_eng: He delivered a moving eulogy at his grandfather's funeral.
back.example_hindi: उसने अपने दादा के अंतिम संस्कार में एक मार्मिक प्रशंसा भाषण दिया।

back.definition_eng: An indirect word/phrase that people often use to refer to something embarrassing or unpleasant.
back.example_eng: 'Passed away' is a common euphemism for 'died'.
back.example_hindi: 'स्वर्गवासी होना' 'मर जाना' के लिए एक आम व्यंजना है।

back.definition_eng: Providing a good example for people to copy.
back.example_eng: Her dedication to her work is exemplary.
back.example_hindi: अपने काम के प्रति उसका समर्पण अनुकरणीय है।

back.definition_eng: To officially state that somebody is not responsible for something that he has been blamed for.
back.example_eng: The new evidence completely exonerated the defendant.
back.example_hindi: नए सबूतों ने प्रतिवादी को पूरी तरह से बरी कर दिया।

back.definition_eng: A person living in a country that is not his own.
back.example_eng: Many expatriates from Europe live and work in Dubai.
back.example_hindi: यूरोप के कई प्रवासी दुबई में रहते और काम करते हैं।

back.definition_eng: Spoken/ done without any previous thought/ preparation.
back.example_eng: He was asked to give an extempore speech at the event.
back.example_hindi: उन्हें कार्यक्रम में बिना तैयारी के भाषण देने के लिए कहा गया था।

back.definition_eng: Spending a lot of more money/using a lot more of something that you can afford or than is necessary.
back.example_eng: Her extravagant lifestyle led to her eventual bankruptcy.
back.example_hindi: उसकी फिजूलखर्ची जीवनशैली ने उसे अंततः दिवालिया बना दिया।

back.definition_eng: A traditional short story that teaches a moral lesson (animals).
back.example_eng: The story of 'The Tortoise and the Hare' is a classic fable.
back.example_hindi: 'कछुआ और खरगोश' की कहानी एक क्लासिक कल्पित कहानी है।

back.definition_eng: Extremely enthusiastic about one's belief.
back.example_eng: He is a fitness fanatic who exercises for two hours every day.
back.example_hindi: वह एक फिटनेस कट्टरपंथी है जो हर दिन दो घंटे व्यायाम करता है।

back.definition_eng: A pleasant situation that you imagine but that is unlikely to happen.
back.example_eng: He lived in a world of fantasy, dreaming of becoming a famous actor.
back.example_hindi: वह एक प्रसिद्ध अभिनेता बनने का सपना देखते हुए, कपोल कल्पित दुनिया में रहता था।

back.definition_eng: A person who supports an extreme political system or attitude which is in favour of strong central government.
back.example_eng: The dictator was a fascist who suppressed all opposition.
back.example_hindi: तानाशाह एक फासीवादी था जिसने सभी विरोधों को दबा दिया।

back.definition_eng: Being careful that every detail is correct; not liking things to be dirty/untidy.
back.example_eng: She was so fastidious about cleanliness that she sanitized her hands every few minutes.
back.example_hindi: वह सफाई को लेकर इतनी दुराराध्य थी कि वह हर कुछ मिनट में अपने हाथ साफ करती थी।

back.definition_eng: Causing or ending in death.
back.example_eng: The car crash resulted in a fatal injury.
back.example_hindi: कार दुर्घटना के परिणामस्वरूप एक घातक चोट लगी।

back.definition_eng: A person who believes that events are decided by fate and cannot be controlled.
back.example_eng: The fatalist accepted his misfortune without complaint, believing it was his destiny.
back.example_hindi: उस भाग्यवादी ने बिना किसी शिकायत के अपने दुर्भाग्य को स्वीकार कर लिया, यह मानते हुए कि यह उसकी नियति थी।

back.definition_eng: All the animals living in an area or in a particular period of history.
back.example_eng: The scientist studied the unique flora and fauna of the island.
back.example_hindi: वैज्ञानिक ने द्वीप के अद्वितीय वनस्पति और पशुवर्ग का अध्ययन किया।

back.definition_eng: Connected with an animal of the cat family.
back.example_eng: She walked with a feline grace that was captivating.
back.example_hindi: वह एक बिल्ली के समान अनुग्रह के साथ चलती थी जो मनमोहक था।

back.definition_eng: A person who supports the belief that women should have the same rights and opportunities as men.
back.example_eng: As a feminist, she fought for equal pay and women's rights.
back.example_hindi: एक नारीवादी के रूप में, उसने समान वेतन और महिलाओं के अधिकारों के लिए लड़ाई लड़ी।

back.definition_eng: Loyalty accuracy.
back.example_eng: Fidelity is a cornerstone of a strong marriage.
back.example_hindi: सत्य के प्रति निष्ठा एक मजबूत विवाह का आधार है।

back.definition_eng: The plants of a particular area, type of environment or period of time.
back.example_eng: The book documents the diverse flora of the Amazon rainforest.
back.example_hindi: यह पुस्तक अमेज़ॅन वर्षावन की विविध वनस्पतियों का दस्तावेजीकरण करती है।

back.definition_eng: The crime of killing your brother/sister.
back.example_eng: The story of Cain and Abel is a tale of fratricide.
back.example_hindi: कैन और हाबिल की कहानी भ्रातृघातक की कहानी है।

back.definition_eng: A person who has escaped/is running away from somewhere and is trying to avoid being caught.
back.example_eng: The fugitive was on the run from the law for three years.
back.example_hindi: वह भगोड़ा तीन साल तक कानून से भागता रहा।

back.definition_eng: Fear of marriage.
back.example_eng: His gamophobia was so strong that he ended the relationship before it got too serious.
back.example_hindi: उसका विवाह का डर इतना मजबूत था कि उसने रिश्ते को बहुत गंभीर होने से पहले ही खत्म कर दिया।

back.definition_eng: The study of family history, including the study of who the ancestors of a particular person were.
back.example_eng: He traced his family's genealogy back to the 16th century.
back.example_hindi: उसने अपने परिवार की वंशावली को 16वीं शताब्दी तक खोजा।

back.definition_eng: The murder of a whole race or a group of people.
back.example_eng: The Holocaust is one of the most horrific acts of genocide in history.
back.example_hindi: होलोकॉस्ट इतिहास में नरसंहार के सबसे भयानक कृत्यों में से एक है।

back.definition_eng: The study of earth, including the origin and history of the rocks and soil of which the earth is made.
back.example_eng: He majored in geology to learn about the formation of mountains and volcanoes.
back.example_hindi: उसने पहाड़ों और ज्वालामुखियों के निर्माण के बारे में जानने के लिए भूगर्भशास्त्र में विशेषज्ञता हासिल की।

back.definition_eng: A substance which destroys bacteria, etc.
back.example_eng: The hospital uses a powerful germicide to clean the operating rooms.
back.definition_hindi: अंकुर का नष्ट करने की शक्ति से युक्त
back.example_hindi: अस्पताल ऑपरेटिंग कमरों को साफ करने के लिए एक शक्तिशाली कीटाणुनाशक का उपयोग करता है।

back.definition_eng: A person who eats too much.
back.example_eng: He was such a glutton that he ate the entire cake by himself.
back.example_hindi: वह इतना खाऊ था कि उसने पूरा केक अकेले ही खा लिया।

back.definition_eng: Liking to be with other people; living in groups (animals).
back.example_eng: Dolphins are gregarious animals that live in large pods.
back.example_hindi: डॉल्फिन झुंड में रहने वाले जानवर हैं जो बड़े समूहों में रहते हैं।

back.definition_eng: Easily tricked because of being too trusting.
back.example_eng: The gullible man lost all his money to a phone scammer.
back.example_hindi: आसानी से धोखा खाने वाले उस व्यक्ति ने एक फोन घोटालेबाज के हाथों अपना सारा पैसा खो दिया।

back.definition_eng: The fact of seeing/hearing something that is not really there.
back.example_eng: The high fever caused him to experience vivid hallucinations.
back.example_hindi: तेज बुखार के कारण उसे तीव्र माया का अनुभव हुआ।

back.definition_eng: A person who believes that pleasure is the most important thing in life.
back.example_eng: The hedonist lived a life of luxury and indulgence.
back.example_hindi: सुखवादी ने विलासिता और भोग का जीवन जिया।

back.definition_eng: Eats only plants (animal).
back.example_eng: The cow is a herbivore, feeding primarily on grass.
back.example_hindi: गाय एक शाकाहारी है, जो मुख्य रूप से घास खाती है।

back.definition_eng: Animals that feed on plants.
back.example_eng: Rabbits and deer are herbivorous animals.
back.example_hindi: खरगोश और हिरण शाकाहारी जानवर हैं।

back.definition_eng: A belief or an opinion that is against the principle of a particular religion.
back.example_eng: In the past, expressing scientific ideas that contradicted the church was considered heresy.
back.example_hindi: अतीत में, चर्च का खंडन करने वाले वैज्ञानिक विचारों को व्यक्त करना विधर्म माना जाता था।

back.definition_eng: A person who, usually for religious reasons, lives a very simple life alone and does not meet/talk to other people.
back.example_eng: The hermit lived in a cave in the mountains, far from civilization.
back.example_hindi: वह एकांतवासी सभ्यता से दूर, पहाड़ों की एक गुफा में रहता था।

back.definition_eng: Something that is said/done to show respect for somebody.
back.example_eng: The concert was a tribute and an homage to the late musician.
back.example_hindi: यह संगीत कार्यक्रम दिवंगत संगीतकार को श्रद्धांजलि और सम्मान था।

back.definition_eng: The crime of killing somebody deliberately.
back.example_eng: The detective was investigating a homicide case.
back.example_hindi: जासूस एक मानव हत्या के मामले की जांच कर रहा था।

back.definition_eng: All (things or people) of the same or similar kind or nature.
back.example_eng: The population of the small village was largely homogeneous.
back.example_hindi: छोटे से गाँव की आबादी काफी हद तक सजातीय थी।

back.definition_eng: A payment made for somebody's professional services; a fee paid for a nominally free service.
back.example_eng: The guest speaker received an honorarium for his lecture.
back.example_hindi: अतिथि वक्ता को उनके व्याख्यान के लिए एक मानदेय मिला।

back.definition_eng: Given as an honour.
back.example_eng: The university awarded him an honorary degree for his contributions to science.
back.example_hindi: विश्वविद्यालय ने उन्हें विज्ञान में उनके योगदान के लिए मानद उपाधि से सम्मानित किया।

back.definition_eng: The study/practice of growing flowers, fruits and vegetables.
back.example_eng: She studied horticulture to learn how to cultivate a beautiful garden.
back.example_hindi: उसने एक सुंदर बगीचा कैसे उगाना है यह जानने के लिए बागवानी का अध्ययन किया।

back.definition_eng: Concerned with reducing suffering and improving the conditions that people live in.
back.example_eng: The organization provides humanitarian aid to regions affected by disaster.
back.example_hindi: यह संगठन आपदा प्रभावित क्षेत्रों को मानवीय सहायता प्रदान करता है।

back.definition_eng: Extreme fear of water.
back.example_eng: After the boating accident, he developed a severe case of hydrophobia.
back.example_hindi: नाव दुर्घटना के बाद, उसे पानी से गंभीर भय हो गया।

back.definition_eng: A song of praise (to god or to a saint or to a nation).
back.example_eng: The church choir sang a beautiful hymn during the service.
back.example_hindi: चर्च के गायक दल ने सेवा के दौरान एक सुंदर भजन गाया।

back.definition_eng: Worried all the time about your health and believing that you are ill/sick when there is nothing wrong with you.
back.example_eng: The hypochondriac visited the doctor for every minor cough or sneeze.
back.example_hindi: वह रोगभ्रमी हर छोटी-मोटी खांसी या छींक के लिए डॉक्टर के पास जाता था।

back.definition_eng: A person who pretends to have moral standards/ opinions that they do not actually have.
back.example_eng: He's a hypocrite; he tells others not to smoke, but he smokes a pack a day.
back.example_hindi: वह एक पाखंडी है; वह दूसरों को धूम्रपान न करने के लिए कहता है, लेकिन वह दिन में एक पैकेट धूम्रपान करता है।

back.definition_eng: A person who criticizes popular beliefs / established customs and ideas.
back.example_eng: The artist was an iconoclast, challenging the traditional norms of the art world.
back.example_hindi: कलाकार एक रिवाज़ तोड़ने वाला था, जो कला जगत के पारंपरिक मानदंडों को चुनौती देता था।

back.definition_eng: A person's particular way of behaving, thinking, etc., especially when it is unusual.
back.example_eng: One of his little idiosyncrasies was always wearing mismatched socks.
back.example_hindi: उसकी छोटी-छोटी विचित्रताओं में से एक हमेशा बेमेल मोज़े पहनना था।

back.definition_eng: Difficult/impossible to read.
back.example_eng: The doctor's handwriting was completely illegible.
back.example_hindi: डॉक्टर की लिखावट पूरी तरह से अस्पष्ट थी।

back.definition_eng: Not allowed by law.
back.example_eng: He was arrested for selling illicit drugs.
back.example_hindi: उसे अवैध ड्रग्स बेचने के आरोप में गिरफ्तार किया गया था।

back.definition_eng: Not knowing how to read/write.
back.example_eng: The program aims to help illiterate adults learn to read and write.
back.example_hindi: इस कार्यक्रम का उद्देश्य निरक्षर वयस्कों को पढ़ना और लिखना सीखने में मदद करना है।

back.definition_eng: A person who comes to a country where they were not born in order to settle there.
back.example_eng: My grandparents were immigrants from Italy.
back.example_hindi: मेरे दादा-दादी इटली के अप्रवासी थे।

back.definition_eng: Strong and impossible to defeat/change.
back.example_eng: The castle was surrounded by an impregnable wall.
back.example_hindi: महल एक अभेद्य दीवार से घिरा हुआ था।

back.definition_eng: A person who pretends to be somebody else in order to trick people.
back.example_eng: The man who claimed to be a prince was revealed to be an imposter.
back.example_hindi: जिस व्यक्ति ने राजकुमार होने का दावा किया था, वह एक ढोंगी निकला।

back.definition_eng: Difficult/ impossible to reach/ to get.
back.example_eng: The remote village is inaccessible during the winter.
back.example_hindi: सर्दियों के दौरान दूरदराज का गाँव दुर्गम होता है।

back.definition_eng: That you cannot hear.
back.example_eng: The sound was almost inaudible to the human ear.
back.example_hindi: यह ध्वनि मानव कान के लिए लगभग अश्राव्य थी।

back.definition_eng: Something that encourages you to do something.
back.example_eng: The company offered a bonus as an incentive for employees to work harder.
back.example_hindi: कंपनी ने कर्मचारियों को और अधिक मेहनत करने के लिए प्रोत्साहन के रूप में बोनस की पेशकश की।

back.definition_eng: Having bad habits which cannot be changed or improved.
back.example_eng: He is an incorrigible liar; you can't believe a word he says.
back.example_hindi: वह एक असंशोधनीय झूठा है; आप उसके एक भी शब्द पर विश्वास नहीं कर सकते।

back.definition_eng: Impossible/difficult to believe.
back.example_eng: The magician performed an incredible trick that amazed the audience.
back.example_hindi: जादूगर ने एक अविश्वसनीय करतब दिखाया जिसने दर्शकों को चकित कर दिया।

back.definition_eng: That cannot be removed/erased.
back.example_eng: The traumatic experience left an indelible mark on his memory.
back.example_hindi: दर्दनाक अनुभव ने उसकी स्मृति पर एक अमिट छाप छोड़ी।

back.definition_eng: Never giving up or getting tired of doing something.
back.example_eng: She was an indefatigable campaigner for human rights.
back.example_hindi: वह मानवाधिकारों के लिए एक अथक प्रचारक थीं।

back.definition_eng: Originating or occurring naturally in the place or country where found; native.
back.example_eng: The kangaroo is an animal indigenous to Australia.
back.example_hindi: कंगारू ऑस्ट्रेलिया का एक स्वदेशी जानवर है।

back.definition_eng: Too great/beautiful to describe in words.
back.example_eng: The beauty of the sunset over the ocean was ineffable.
back.example_hindi: समुद्र के ऊपर सूर्यास्त की सुंदरता अवर्णनीय थी।

back.definition_eng: Not having necessary qualifications to have/ do something.
back.example_eng: Since he had a criminal record, he was ineligible for the job.
back.example_hindi: चूंकि उसका एक आपराधिक रिकॉर्ड था, वह नौकरी के लिए अयोग्य था।

back.definition_eng: That you cannot avoid/prevent.
back.example_eng: After the massive loss, the company's bankruptcy was inevitable.
back.example_hindi: भारी नुकसान के बाद कंपनी का दिवालिया होना अपरिहार्य था।

back.definition_eng: That cannot be stopped or changed.
back.example_eng: The inexorable march of time affects us all.
back.example_hindi: समय की निष्ठुर चाल हम सभी को प्रभावित करती है।

back.definition_eng: That never fails; always doing what it is supposed to do.
back.example_eng: The Pope's judgment on matters of faith is considered infallible by Catholics.
back.example_hindi: कैथोलिकों द्वारा आस्था के मामलों पर पोप के निर्णय को अचूक माना जाता है।

back.definition_eng: The crime of killing a baby.
back.example_eng: The practice of female infanticide has been outlawed in many countries.
back.example_hindi: कई देशों में कन्या शिशु हत्या की प्रथा को गैरकानूनी घोषित कर दिया गया है।

back.definition_eng: A person not having enough to pay what he owes.
back.example_eng: The company was declared insolvent after it could not pay its debts.
back.example_hindi: कंपनी को अपने कर्ज का भुगतान न कर पाने के बाद दिवालिया घोषित कर दिया गया।

back.definition_eng: The condition of being unable to sleep.
back.example_eng: Stress and anxiety can often lead to insomnia.
back.example_hindi: तनाव और चिंता अक्सर अनिद्रा का कारण बन सकते हैं।

back.definition_eng: The act of burying a dead person.
back.example_eng: The interment of the king took place at the royal cemetery.
back.example_hindi: राजा का दफ़न शाही कब्रिस्तान में हुआ।

back.definition_eng: The act of confining someone in a prison.
back.example_eng: During the war, many citizens of enemy nationality faced internment.
back.example_hindi: युद्ध के दौरान, दुश्मन राष्ट्रीयता के कई नागरिकों को नजरबंदी का सामना करना पड़ा।

back.definition_eng: A period of time during which a country, an organization, etc. does not have a leader and is waiting for a new one.
back.example_eng: There was a brief interregnum between the two rulers.
back.definition_hindi: दो शासनों के बीच का काल
back.example_hindi: दोनों शासकों के बीच एक संक्षिप्त अंतराल था।

back.definition_eng: Having made no legal will.
back.example_eng: He died intestate, so his property was divided according to the law.
back.example_hindi: उसकी मृत्यु बिना वसीयत के हुई, इसलिए उसकी संपत्ति कानून के अनुसार विभाजित की गई।

back.definition_eng: Too strong to be defeated/changed.
back.example_eng: The champion boxer seemed invincible in the ring.
back.example_hindi: चैंपियन मुक्केबाज रिंग में अजेय लग रहा था।

back.definition_eng: Travelling from place to place, especially to find work.
back.example_eng: The itinerant workers moved from farm to farm during the harvest season.
back.example_hindi: भ्रमणकारी मजदूर फसल के मौसम में एक खेत से दूसरे खेत में जाते थे।

back.definition_eng: A plan of a journey, including the route and the places that you visit.
back.example_eng: Our travel agent prepared a detailed itinerary for our trip to Europe.
back.example_hindi: हमारे यात्रा एजेंट ने हमारी यूरोप यात्रा के लिए एक विस्तृत यात्रा कार्यक्रम तैयार किया।

back.definition_eng: A person in a court who has the authority to decide how criminals should be punished or to make legal decisions.
back.example_eng: The judge sentenced the defendant to five years in prison.
back.example_hindi: न्यायाधीश ने प्रतिवादी को पांच साल की कैद की सजा सुनाई।

back.definition_eng: Place side by side.
back.example_eng: The artist chose to juxtapose bright colors with dark shades in his painting.
back.example_hindi: कलाकार ने अपनी पेंटिंग में चमकीले रंगों को गहरे रंगों के साथ मिलाना चुना।

back.definition_eng: A mental illness in which somebody has a strong desire, which they cannot control, to steal things.
back.example_eng: She was diagnosed with kleptomania after being caught shoplifting multiple times.
back.example_hindi: कई बार दुकानदारी करते पकड़े जाने के बाद उसे क्लेप्टोमेनिया का निदान किया गया।

back.definition_eng: The sound of a bell rung slowly to announce a death/ a funeral/the end of something.
back.example_eng: The church bell's knell signaled the start of the funeral.
back.example_hindi: चर्च की घंटी की शोक सूचक ध्वनि ने अंतिम संस्कार की शुरुआत का संकेत दिया।

back.definition_eng: Everything you can see when you look across a large area of land.
back.example_eng: The artist painted a beautiful landscape of the countryside.
back.example_hindi: कलाकार ने ग्रामीण इलाकों का एक सुंदर परिदृश्य चित्रित किया।

back.definition_eng: A skilled worker who cuts and engraves precious stones.
back.example_eng: The lapidist carefully cut the diamond to maximize its brilliance.
back.definition_hindi: कुशल श्रमिक जो कीमती पत्थरों को काटता और उकेरता है
back.example_hindi: कुशल जौहरी ने हीरे को उसकी चमक को अधिकतम करने के लिए सावधानी से काटा।

back.definition_eng: A medicine, food/ drink that makes somebody empty their bowels easily.
back.example_eng: He took a laxative to relieve his constipation.
back.example_hindi: उसने अपनी कब्ज से राहत पाने के लिए एक पेट साफ करने वाली दवा ली।

back.definition_eng: A legal agreement that allows you to use a building, piece of equipment/ some land for a period of time, usually in return for rent.
back.example_eng: We signed a one-year lease for the apartment.
back.example_hindi: हमने अपार्टमेंट के लिए एक साल के पट्टे पर हस्ताक्षर किए।

back.definition_eng: A story from ancient times about people and events, that may/may not be true.
back.example_eng: The legend of King Arthur has been told for centuries.
back.example_hindi: राजा आर्थर की दिव्य चरित्र की कहानी सदियों से सुनाई जाती रही है।

back.definition_eng: A person who writes and edits dictionaries.
back.example_eng: The lexicographer spent years compiling the new dictionary.
back.example_hindi: कोशकार ने नया शब्दकोश संकलित करने में वर्षों बिताए।

back.definition_eng: One who talks a lot.
back.example_eng: My loquacious aunt can talk for hours on the phone.
back.example_hindi: मेरी बातूनी चाची फोन पर घंटों बात कर सकती हैं।

back.definition_eng: Being the first of its kind (speech, journey by a plane/ship), etc.
back.example_eng: The Titanic's maiden voyage ended in disaster.
back.example_hindi: टाइटैनिक की पहली यात्रा एक आपदा में समाप्त हुई।

back.definition_eng: The first speech made by a person.
back.example_eng: The new Member of Parliament delivered his maiden speech today.
back.example_hindi: नए सांसद ने आज अपना पहला भाषण दिया।

back.definition_eng: A copy of a book, piece of music, etc. before it has been printed.
back.example_eng: The author submitted the final manuscript of her novel to the publisher.
back.example_hindi: लेखक ने अपने उपन्यास की अंतिम हस्तलिपि प्रकाशक को सौंपी।

back.definition_eng: A person who suffers very much or is killed because of his religious/ political beliefs.
back.example_eng: Joan of Arc is considered a martyr by the Catholic Church.
back.example_hindi: जोन ऑफ आर्क को कैथोलिक चर्च द्वारा एक शहीद माना जाता है।

back.definition_eng: Someone who obtains pleasure from receiving punishment.
back.example_eng: Only a masochist would enjoy such a painful and difficult task.
back.example_hindi: केवल एक परपीड़न-कामुक ही इतने दर्दनाक और कठिन कार्य का आनंद उठाएगा।

back.definition_eng: The killing of one's mother.
back.example_eng: The character in the play commits matricide in a fit of rage.
back.example_hindi: नाटक का पात्र गुस्से में आकर मातृहत्या कर बैठता है।

back.definition_eng: A mental illness/condition in which somebody has an exaggerated belief in their own importance/power.
back.example_eng: The dictator's megalomania led him to believe he was invincible.
back.example_hindi: तानाशाह के अहंकारोन्माद ने उसे यह विश्वास दिलाया कि वह अजेय है।

back.definition_eng: A proposal/ report on a particular subject for a person, an organisation, a committee, etc.
back.example_eng: The CEO sent a memorandum to all employees about the new policy.
back.example_hindi: सीईओ ने सभी कर्मचारियों को नई नीति के बारे में एक ज्ञापन भेजा।

back.definition_eng: A soldier who will fight for any country/group that offers payment.
back.example_eng: The warlord hired a group of mercenaries to protect his territory.
back.example_hindi: सरदार ने अपने क्षेत्र की रक्षा के लिए किराए के सैनिकों के एक समूह को काम पर रखा।

back.definition_eng: A place where money is coined by authority of the government.
back.example_eng: The new coins were produced at the national mint.
back.example_hindi: नए सिक्के राष्ट्रीय टकसाल में बनाए गए थे।

back.definition_eng: A person who hates and avoids other people.
back.example_eng: After years of betrayal, he became a misanthrope, preferring solitude.
back.example_hindi: वर्षों के धोखे के बाद, वह एक मानवद्वेषी बन गया और एकांत पसंद करने लगा।

back.definition_eng: A person who hates marriage.
back.example_eng: As a confirmed misogamist, he swore he would never get married.
back.example_hindi: एक पक्के विवाह-द्वेषी के रूप में, उसने कसम खाई कि वह कभी शादी नहीं करेगा।

back.definition_eng: A person who dislikes women.
back.example_eng: His misogynist remarks made everyone in the room uncomfortable.
back.example_hindi: उसकी स्त्री-द्वेषी टिप्पणियों ने कमरे में मौजूद सभी को असहज कर दिया।

back.definition_eng: Very important or serious.
back.example_eng: The signing of the peace treaty was a momentous occasion.
back.example_hindi: शांति संधि पर हस्ताक्षर करना एक सबसे अहम अवसर था।

back.definition_eng: A system of government by a king/a queen.
back.example_eng: The United Kingdom is a constitutional monarchy.
back.example_hindi: यूनाइटेड किंगडम एक संवैधानिक राज-तंत्र है।

back.definition_eng: A long speech by one person during a conversation that stops other people from speaking or expressing an opinion.
back.example_eng: The actor delivered a powerful monologue that captivated the audience.
back.example_hindi: अभिनेता ने एक शक्तिशाली स्वगत भाषण दिया जिसने दर्शकों को मंत्रमुग्ध कर दिया।

back.definition_eng: The belief that there is only one god.
back.example_eng: Judaism, Christianity, and Islam are all forms of monotheism.
back.example_hindi: यहूदी धर्म, ईसाई धर्म और इस्लाम सभी एकेश्वरवाद के रूप हैं।

back.definition_eng: Subject to death.
back.example_eng: All humans are mortal.
back.example_hindi: सभी मनुष्य नाशवान हैं।

back.definition_eng: A place/room/building in which dead bodies are kept before they are buried/cremated.
back.example_eng: The body was taken to the mortuary for a post-mortem examination.
back.example_hindi: शव को पोस्टमार्टम के लिए शवगृह ले जाया गया।

back.definition_eng: The act of refusing to obey the orders of somebody in authority, especially by soldiers/ sailors.
back.example_eng: The sailors staged a mutiny against the cruel captain.
back.example_hindi: नाविकों ने क्रूर कप्तान के खिलाफ गदर कर दिया।

back.definition_eng: A person who tries to become united with god through prayer and meditation and so understand important things that are beyond normal human understanding.
back.example_eng: The mystic spent his days in deep meditation.
back.example_hindi: रहस्यवादी ने अपने दिन गहरे ध्यान में बिताए।

back.definition_eng: A person who admires himself/herself too much, especially his appearance.
back.example_eng: The narcissist constantly checked his reflection in every mirror.
back.example_hindi: आत्मरतिक व्यक्ति हर दर्पण में लगातार अपना प्रतिबिंब देखता रहता था।

back.definition_eng: Giving unfair advantages to your own family if you are in a position of power, especially by giving them jobs.
back.example_eng: He was accused of nepotism after hiring his unqualified son for a key position.
back.example_hindi: उस पर अपने अयोग्य बेटे को एक प्रमुख पद पर रखने के बाद भाई-भतीजावाद का आरोप लगाया गया।

back.definition_eng: Not supporting/ helping either side in a disagreement, competition, etc.
back.example_eng: Switzerland remained a neutral country during both World Wars.
back.example_hindi: स्विट्जरलैंड दोनों विश्व युद्धों के दौरान एक तटस्थ देश बना रहा।

back.definition_eng: A person who has recently started an activity.
back.example_eng: As a neophyte in the kitchen, he struggled to even boil an egg.
back.example_hindi: रसोई में एक नवसिखुआ के रूप में, उसे अंडा उबालने में भी संघर्ष करना पड़ा।

back.definition_eng: Well-known for being bad.
back.example_eng: The gangster was notorious for his cruelty.
back.example_hindi: गैंगस्टर अपनी क्रूरता के लिए कुख्यात था।

back.definition_eng: A person who is new and has little experience in a skill, job or situation.
back.example_eng: He is a complete novice at skiing.
back.example_hindi: वह स्कीइंग में एक पूरा नौसिखिया है।

back.definition_eng: A person who collects or studies coins or medals.
back.example_eng: The numismatist had an impressive collection of ancient Roman coins.
back.example_hindi: मुद्राशास्त्री के पास प्राचीन रोमन सिक्कों का एक प्रभावशाली संग्रह था।

back.definition_eng: The behaviour of a woman who has or wants to have sex very often.
back.example_eng: In the story, the character's nymphomania leads to many complications.
back.example_hindi: कहानी में, चरित्र का कामोन्माद कई जटिलताओं को जन्म देता है।

back.definition_eng: The act of obeying.
back.example_eng: The subjects made obeisance to the queen.
back.example_hindi: प्रजा ने रानी को आदरपूर्वक प्रणाम किया।

back.definition_eng: A notice of someone's death (with his life and achievements).
back.example_eng: The newspaper published a lengthy obituary for the famous writer.
back.example_hindi: अखबार ने प्रसिद्ध लेखक के लिए एक लंबा शोक सन्देश प्रकाशित किया।

back.definition_eng: Not clearly understood or expressed.
back.example_eng: The meaning of the ancient text was obscure.
back.example_hindi: प्राचीन पाठ का अर्थ अस्पष्ट था।

back.definition_eng: No longer used because something new has been invented.

back.example_hindi: जॉन कीट्स का 'ओड टू ए नाइटिंगेल' एक प्रसिद्ध रोमांटिक संबोधगीत है।

back.example_hindi: उपन्यास का कथावाचक एक सर्वज्ञ कहानीकार है।

back.definition_eng: Eating all types of food (plants and meat).

back.example_hindi: मनुष्य सर्व-भक्षक हैं, जो पौधे और जानवर दोनों खाते हैं।

back.definition_eng: Study and treatment of tumours.

back.example_hindi: बाथरूम के दरवाजे में लगा धुंधला कांच अपारदर्शी है।

back.example_hindi: प्रकाशिकीविद् ने मुझे मेरे नए चश्मे के लिए सही फ्रेम चुनने में मदद की।

back.definition_eng: A person who always expects good things to happen or things to be successful.

back.example_hindi: चुनौतियों के बावजूद, वह एक आशावादी बनी रही, यह विश्वास करते हुए कि सब कुछ ठीक हो जाएगा।

back.definition_eng: A formal speech made on a public occasion, especially as part of a ceremony.

back.definition_eng: A person who is good at public speaking/ who makes formal speeches.

back.example_hindi: प्रधानमंत्री एक कुशल वक्ता होने के लिए जाने जाते थे।

back.definition_eng: A person who studies birds.

back.example_hindi: पक्षी विज्ञानी ने जंगल में दुर्लभ पक्षी प्रजातियों का अध्ययन करते हुए महीनों बिताए।

back.definition_eng: The scientific study of birds.

back.definition_eng: A child whose parents are dead.

back.example_hindi: दयालु दंपति ने एक अनाथ को गोद लेने का फैसला किया।

back.definition_eng: A person who believes that war and violence are always wrong.

back.definition_eng: Branch of medicine concerned with children and their diseases.

back.definition_eng: Able to be touched or felt.

back.example_hindi: कमरे में तनाव इतना घना था कि वह लगभग स्पर्शनीय था।

back.definition_eng: The belief that god is present in all natural things.

back.example_hindi: सर्वेश्वरवाद हर पेड़, नदी और पहाड़ में दिव्यता देखता है।

back.definition_eng: A short story that teaches a spiritual lesson, especially one of those told by Jesus.

back.example_hindi: शिक्षक ने छात्रों को दया के महत्व के बारे में एक नीति कथा सुनाई।

back.definition_eng: The crime of killing your father, mother or a close relative.

back.definition_eng: An ardent and enthusiastic supporter of some person/activity.

back.definition_eng: The crime of killing your father.
back.example_eng: He was tried and convicted for patricide.
back.example_hindi: उस पर पितृहत्या का मुकदमा चलाया गया और उसे दोषी ठहराया गया।

back.definition_eng: Property that is given to somebody when his father dies.

back.example_hindi: उसे भूमि और धन की एक विशाल विरासत मिली।

back.example_hindi: प्रोफेसर एक रूढ़िवादी थे जो लगातार अपने छात्रों की छोटी-मोटी व्याकरण की गलतियों को सुधारते थे।

back.definition_eng: A person walking and not travelling in a vehicle.

back.example_hindi: शहर पैदल यात्रियों के लिए इसे सुरक्षित बनाने के लिए और अधिक फुटपाथ बना रहा है।

back.definition_eng: A large mass of land projecting into a body of water.

back.example_hindi: फ्लोरिडा राज्य एक बड़ा प्रायद्वीप है।

back.definition_eng: A person who always expects bad things to happen or something not to be successful.

back.example_hindi: उसकी एक इश्कबाज के रूप में प्रतिष्ठा थी।

back.definition_eng: A rich person who helps the poor and those in need, especially by giving money.

back.definition_eng: A person who collects or studies stamps.

back.example_hindi: डाक टिकट संग्रहकर्ता ने गर्व से अपना दुर्लभ टिकट संग्रह दिखाया।

back.definition_eng: A person who does not like/understand art, literature, music, etc.

back.example_hindi: उसने मुझे अशिक्षित कहा क्योंकि मुझे शास्त्रीय संगीत पसंद नहीं है।

back.definition_eng: A person who esteems woman as the higher type of humanity.

back.definition_eng: The scientific study of the development of language or of a particular language.

back.definition_eng: The act of stealing small amounts or small articles.

back.definition_eng: Government by the richest people of a country.

back.example_hindi: अधिकांश देशों में बहुविवाह अवैध है।

back.definition_eng: A person who knows, uses/writes in more than one language.

back.example_hindi: राजनयिक एक बहुभाषी था, जो छह अलग-अलग भाषाओं में पारंगत था।

back.definition_eng: A flat shape with at least three straight sides and three angles, and usually five or more.

back.example_hindi: एक वर्ग चार समान भुजाओं वाला एक बहुभुज है।

back.definition_eng: An unusually gifted/intelligent (young) person.

back.example_hindi: मोजार्ट एक बाल विलक्षण था जिसने बहुत कम उम्र में संगीत की रचना की।

back.definition_eng: A speech, etc. at the beginning of a play, book, or film that introduces it.

back.example_hindi: नाटक की प्रस्तावना आने वाली त्रासदी के लिए दृश्य निर्धारित करती है।

back.definition_eng: A person sent by god to teach the people and give them messages from god.

back.example_hindi: पैगंबर ने लोगों को अपने तरीके बदलने की चेतावनी दी।

back.definition_eng: A person who has been converted to another religious or political belief.
back.example_eng: The missionary was successful in making a new proselyte.
back.example_hindi: मिशनरी एक नया धर्मांतरित व्यक्ति बनाने में सफल रहा।

back.definition_eng: A system of fixed rules and formal behaviour used at official meetings.
back.example_eng: Diplomatic protocol must be followed during the state visit.
back.example_hindi: राजकीय यात्रा के दौरान राजनयिक शिष्टाचार का पालन किया जाना चाहिए।

back.definition_eng: The study of how people vote in elections.

back.example_hindi: चुनाव विश्लेषण मतदान पैटर्न का विश्लेषण करने और चुनाव परिणामों की भविष्यवाणी करने में मदद करता है।

back.definition_eng: A fictitious name used instead of his real names.

back.definition_eng: The scientific study of the mind and how it influences behaviour.
back.example_eng: She studied psychology to understand human behavior.
back.example_hindi: उसने मानव व्यवहार को समझने के लिए मनोविज्ञान का अध्ययन किया।

back.definition_eng: The clever or humorous use of a word that has more than one meaning, or of words that have different meanings but sound the same.

back.example_hindi: एक अच्छा श्लेष अपने आप में एक इनाम है।

back.example_hindi: अदालत के मनोवैज्ञानिक द्वारा आगजनी करने वाले को दहनोन्माद का निदान किया गया।

back.definition_eng: Money that is paid to kidnappers.

back.example_hindi: अपहरणकर्ताओं ने दस लाख डॉलर की फिरौती मांगी।

back.definition_eng: Greedy for money.

back.example_hindi: लालची मकान मालिक किराया बढ़ाता रहा।

back.definition_eng: A person who lives alone and likes to avoid other people.
back.example_eng: The wealthy businessman became a recluse after his wife's death.
back.example_hindi: अपनी पत्नी की मृत्यु के बाद धनी व्यवसायी एक वैरागी बन गया।

back.definition_eng: The practice of requiring excessive paperwork and tedious procedures before official action can be considered/ completed.

back.example_hindi: सरकारी लालफीताशाही के कारण परियोजना में महीनों की देरी हुई।

back.definition_eng: A person who has been forced to leave his country/ home, because there is a war or for political, religious or social reasons.

back.example_hindi: यह शिविर युद्ध से भाग रहे शरणार्थियों को आश्रय प्रदान करने के लिए स्थापित किया गया था।

back.definition_eng: The crime of killing a king/queen.

back.example_hindi: राज-हत्या को राजद्रोह के सबसे गंभीर रूपों में से एक माना जाता है।

back.definition_eng: Return the same sort of attack / give tit for tat.
back.example_eng: The army was ordered not to retaliate against the provocation.
back.example_hindi: सेना को उकसावे के खिलाफ प्रतिकार न करने का आदेश दिया गया।

back.definition_eng: Unwilling to tell people about things / one who speaks less.
back.example_eng: He was very reticent about his past.
back.example_hindi: वह अपने अतीत के बारे में बहुत अल्पभाषी था।

back.definition_eng: To move away from a place; to back off.
back.example_eng: The army was forced to retreat after a heavy attack.
back.example_hindi: भारी हमले के बाद सेना को पीछे हटने के लिए मजबूर होना पड़ा।

back.definition_eng: Speech/writing that is intended to influence people, but that is not completely honest/sincere.
back.example_eng: The politician's speech was full of empty rhetoric.
back.example_hindi: राजनेता का भाषण खोखली वक्रपटुता से भरा था।

back.definition_eng: Unkind remarks that make fun of somebody/something or make him/ it look silly.
back.example_eng: She was subjected to ridicule for her unusual ideas.
back.example_hindi: उसे उसके असामान्य विचारों के लिए उपहास का पात्र बनाया गया।

back.definition_eng: A series of actions that are always performed in the same way, especially as part of a religious ceremony.
back.example_eng: The wedding ceremony included several ancient rituals.
back.example_hindi: विवाह समारोह में कई प्राचीन अनुष्ठान शामिल थे।

back.definition_eng: An act of treating a holy thing or place without respect.
back.example_eng: Vandalizing the temple was considered an act of sacrilege.
back.example_hindi: मंदिर में तोड़फोड़ को अपवित्रीकरण का कार्य माना गया।

back.definition_eng: A person who gets pleasure from hurting other people.
back.example_eng: The movie's villain was a cruel sadist.
back.example_hindi: फिल्म का खलनायक एक क्रूर परपीड़क था।

back.definition_eng: A place like a hospital where patients who have a lasting illness/who are getting better after an illness are treated.
back.example_eng: He spent six months recovering at a sanatorium in the mountains.
back.example_hindi: उसने पहाड़ों के एक आरोग्य निवास में ठीक होने में छह महीने बिताए।

back.definition_eng: The state of being very important and worth protecting.
back.example_eng: The sanctity of the marriage vows should be respected.
back.example_hindi: विवाह की शपथ की पवित्रता का सम्मान किया जाना चाहिए।

back.definition_eng: Optimistic in an apparently difficult situation.
back.example_eng: She remained sanguine about her chances of recovery.
back.example_hindi: वह अपने ठीक होने की संभावनाओं के बारे में आशावादी बनी रही।

back.definition_eng: A way of criticizing a person, an idea or an institution in which you use humour to show his/its faults/ weaknesses.
back.example_eng: The show uses political satire to comment on current events.
back.example_hindi: यह शो वर्तमान घटनाओं पर टिप्पणी करने के लिए राजनीतिक हास्य व्यंग्य का उपयोग करता है।

back.definition_eng: Someone who habitually doubts accepted beliefs.
back.example_eng: He is a sceptic who questions everything he is told.
back.example_hindi: वह एक संदेहवादी है जो उसे बताई गई हर बात पर सवाल उठाता है।

back.definition_eng: An attitude of doubting that claims/statements are true and that something will happen.
back.example_eng: Her initial scepticism turned to belief after seeing the evidence.
back.example_hindi: सबूत देखने के बाद उसका प्रारंभिक संदेहवाद विश्वास में बदल गया।

back.definition_eng: A plan that lists all the work that you have to do and when you must do each thing.
back.example_eng: I have a very busy schedule this week.
back.example_hindi: इस हफ्ते मेरी एक बहुत व्यस्त अनुसूची है।

back.definition_eng: A person who knows all about a particular subject because he has studied it in detail.
back.example_eng: He is a renowned scholar of ancient history.
back.example_hindi: वह प्राचीन इतिहास के एक प्रसिद्ध पंडित हैं।

back.definition_eng: A small room next to the kitchen in an old house, originally used for washing dishes, etc.
back.example_eng: The dirty dishes were piled up in the scullery.
back.example_hindi: बर्तन माँजने की जगह में गंदे बर्तन ढेर लगे हुए थे।

back.definition_eng: Living among ordinary people rather than in a religious community; Government not connected with religious or spiritual matters.
back.example_eng: India is a secular country, respecting all religions.
back.example_hindi: भारत एक धर्मनिरपेक्ष देश है, जो सभी धर्मों का सम्मान करता है।

back.definition_eng: A person who claims that he can see what is going to happen in the future.
back.example_eng: The ancient seer predicted the fall of the empire.
back.example_hindi: प्राचीन पैगंबर ने साम्राज्य के पतन की भविष्यवाणी की थी।

back.definition_eng: The scientific study of earthquakes.
back.example_eng: Seismology helps us understand the causes and effects of earthquakes.
back.example_hindi: भूकंप विज्ञान हमें भूकंपों के कारणों और प्रभावों को समझने में मदद करता है।

back.definition_eng: A person between the ages of 70 and 79.
back.example_eng: My grandfather, a spry septuagenarian, still goes for a walk every day.
back.definition_hindi: सत्तर वर्ष की अवस्था का मनुष्य
back.example_hindi: मेरे दादाजी, एक फुर्तीले सत्तर वर्षीय, अभी भी हर दिन टहलने जाते हैं।

back.definition_eng: A job that you are paid for even though it involves little/no work.
back.example_eng: His position on the board was a sinecure; he rarely attended meetings.
back.definition_hindi: ऐसा पद जिस में वेतन मिले परन्तु कुछ काम न करना पड़े
back.example_hindi: बोर्ड में उसका पद एक ऐसी नौकरी थी जिसमें काम कम और वेतन ज्यादा था; वह शायद ही कभी बैठकों में शामिल होता था।

back.definition_eng: A person who believes in or supports the belief that everyone has an equal right to a share of a country's wealth and that the government should own and control the main industries.
back.example_eng: The socialist politician argued for more public services.
back.example_hindi: समाजवादी राजनेता ने और अधिक सार्वजनिक सेवाओं के लिए तर्क दिया।

back.definition_eng: The study and classification of human societies.
back.example_eng: Sociology examines how social structures and institutions shape our lives.
back.example_hindi: समाजशास्त्र यह जांचता है कि सामाजिक संरचनाएं और संस्थाएं हमारे जीवन को कैसे आकार देती हैं।

back.definition_eng: A temporary stay (as a guest).
back.example_eng: Our sojourn in the countryside was a refreshing break from city life.
back.example_hindi: ग्रामीण इलाकों में हमारा अस्थायी निवास शहरी जीवन से एक ताजगी भरा विराम था।

back.definition_eng: A speech in a play in which a character, who is alone on the stage, speaks his/her thoughts.
back.example_eng: Hamlet's famous 'To be or not to be' speech is a soliloquy.
back.example_hindi: हेमलेट का प्रसिद्ध 'होना या न होना' भाषण एक आत्मभाषण है।

back.definition_eng: A poem that has 14 lines, each containing 10 syllables, and a fixed pattern of rhyme.
back.example_eng: Shakespeare wrote many famous sonnets about love and beauty.
back.example_hindi: शेक्सपियर ने प्रेम और सौंदर्य के बारे में कई प्रसिद्ध गाथाएँ लिखीं।

back.definition_eng: A drug making you want to go to sleep.
back.example_eng: The monotonous lecture had a soporific effect on the audience.
back.example_hindi: उबाऊ व्याख्यान का दर्शकों पर नींद लाने वाला प्रभाव पड़ा।

back.definition_eng: The murder of one's sister.
back.example_eng: The crime of sororicide is extremely rare but deeply tragic.
back.example_hindi: बहन की हत्या का अपराध अत्यंत दुर्लभ लेकिन गहरा दुखद है।

back.definition_eng: An old unmarried woman.
back.example_eng: In the old novel, the main character was a kind-hearted spinster.
back.example_hindi: पुराने उपन्यास में, मुख्य पात्र एक दयालु वृद्ध अविवाहित महिला थी।

back.definition_eng: A person who is able to suffer pain/trouble without complaining/showing what they are feeling.
back.example_eng: He remained stoic despite the immense pain.
back.example_hindi: अत्यधिक दर्द के बावजूद वह उदासीन बना रहा।

back.definition_eng: The fact of not explaining/showing what you are feeling when you are suffering.
back.example_eng: His stoicism in the face of adversity was admirable.
back.example_hindi: विपत्ति के समय उसका वैराग्य सराहनीय था।

back.definition_eng: The right to vote in political elections.
back.example_eng: The suffragette movement fought for women's suffrage.
back.example_hindi: मताधिकार आंदोलन ने महिलाओं के मताधिकार के लिए संघर्ष किया।

back.definition_eng: The act of killing yourself deliberately.
back.example_eng: The novel deals with the sensitive topic of suicide.
back.example_hindi: यह उपन्यास आत्महत्या के संवेदनशील विषय से संबंधित है।

back.definition_eng: A brief account of a subject.
back.example_eng: Please provide a brief summary of the report's main findings.
back.example_hindi: कृपया रिपोर्ट के मुख्य निष्कर्षों का एक संक्षिप्त सारांश प्रदान करें।

back.definition_eng: The belief that particular events happen in a way that cannot be explained by reason/ science.
back.example_eng: It is a common superstition that breaking a mirror brings bad luck.
back.example_hindi: यह एक आम अंधविश्वास है कि आईना तोड़ने से दुर्भाग्य आता है।

back.definition_eng: A person who praises important or powerful people too much and in a way that is not sincere, especially in order to get something from them.
back.example_eng: The manager was surrounded by sycophants who agreed with his every word.
back.example_hindi: मैनेजर चापलूसों से घिरा हुआ था जो उसकी हर बात से सहमत थे।

back.definition_eng: A building where the Jews meet for religious worship and teaching.
back.example_eng: The family went to the synagogue for the weekly service.
back.example_hindi: परिवार साप्ताहिक सेवा के लिए यहूदियों के आराधनालय गया।

back.definition_eng: The art of stuffing dead animals, birds and fish with a special material so that they may look like living ones and can be displayed.
back.example_eng: The museum had a fascinating exhibit of taxidermy showing animals in their natural habitats.
back.example_hindi: संग्रहालय में जानवरों को उनके प्राकृतिक आवासों में दिखाने वाली चर्मपूर्णता की एक आकर्षक प्रदर्शनी थी।

back.definition_eng: A person who does not drink alcohol.
back.example_eng: As a teetotaller, he always orders juice or water at parties.
back.example_hindi: एक मादक द्रव्यों का त्यागी होने के नाते, वह पार्टियों में हमेशा जूस या पानी ऑर्डर करता है।

back.definition_eng: Connected with/ limited by time.
back.example_eng: The film explores both the spiritual and temporal aspects of life.
back.example_hindi: यह फिल्म जीवन के आध्यात्मिक और लौकिक दोनों पहलुओं की पड़ताल करती है।

back.definition_eng: Sticking together.
back.example_eng: The tenacious reporter would not give up until she had the full story.
back.example_hindi: दृढ़ पत्रकार तब तक हार नहीं मानेगी जब तक उसे पूरी कहानी नहीं मिल जाती।

back.definition_eng: Living on the land/on the ground, rather than in water/on trees/ in the air.
back.example_eng: Lions are terrestrial animals, whereas dolphins are aquatic.
back.example_hindi: शेर स्थलीय जानवर हैं, जबकि डॉल्फिन जलीय हैं।

back.definition_eng: A person who uses violent action in order to achieve political aims or to force a government to act.
back.example_eng: The government is committed to fighting terrorist groups.
back.example_hindi: सरकार आतंकवादी समूहों से लड़ने के लिए प्रतिबद्ध है।

back.definition_eng: Belief in the existence of god.
back.example_eng: Theism is a core principle of many world religions.
back.example_hindi: आस्तिकता कई विश्व धर्मों का एक मूल सिद्धांत है।

back.definition_eng: One who believes in the existence of god.
back.example_eng: As a theist, she prays every day.
back.example_hindi: एक आस्तिक के रूप में, वह हर दिन प्रार्थना करती है।

back.definition_eng: Government of a country by religious leaders.
back.example_eng: In a theocracy, religious law is the basis of the country's legal system.
back.example_hindi: एक धर्मतंत्र में, धार्मिक कानून देश की कानूनी प्रणाली का आधार होता है।

back.definition_eng: The study of religion and beliefs.
back.example_eng: He went to the seminary to study theology.
back.example_hindi: वह धर्मशास्त्र का अध्ययन करने के लिए सेमिनरी गया।

back.definition_eng: The way the parts of something are arranged and related.
back.example_eng: The network's topology determined how data flowed between computers.
back.example_hindi: नेटवर्क की सांस्थिति ने यह निर्धारित किया कि कंप्यूटरों के बीच डेटा कैसे प्रवाहित होता है।

back.definition_eng: A person who works against his country.
back.example_eng: The soldier was executed as a traitor for selling secrets to the enemy.
back.example_hindi: सैनिक को दुश्मन को रहस्य बेचने के लिए एक गद्दार के रूप में मार दिया गया था।

back.definition_eng: Continuing for only a short time.
back.example_eng: Youth and beauty are often transitory.
back.example_hindi: यौवन और सुंदरता अक्सर क्षणिक होते हैं।

back.definition_eng: Allowing light to pass through but not transparent.
back.example_eng: The frosted glass window was translucent, providing privacy while letting in light.
back.example_hindi: धुंधला कांच की खिड़की पारभासी थी, जो प्रकाश को अंदर आने देते हुए गोपनीयता प्रदान करती थी।

back.definition_eng: Allowing you to see through it (glass etc.).
back.example_eng: The clean window was so transparent it looked like there was no glass at all.
back.example_hindi: साफ खिड़की इतनी पारदर्शी थी कि ऐसा लग रहा था जैसे कोई कांच ही नहीं है।

back.definition_eng: Not important or serious; not worth considering.
back.example_eng: They argued over a trivial matter and ruined the evening.
back.example_hindi: उन्होंने एक तुच्छ मामले पर बहस की और शाम बर्बाद कर दी।

back.definition_eng: A child who stays away from school without permission.
back.example_eng: The school has a strict policy for dealing with truant students.
back.example_hindi: स्कूल में बिना अनुमति के स्कूल से अनुपस्थित रहने वाले छात्रों से निपटने के लिए एक सख्त नीति है।

back.definition_eng: A statement that is clearly true and does not add anything interesting or important to a discussion.
back.example_eng: His speech was full of clichés and truisms like 'time is money'.
back.example_hindi: उनका भाषण 'समय ही धन है' जैसे क्लिच और सामान्य सत्यों से भरा था।

back.definition_eng: Done by or involving all the people in the world or in a particular group.
back.example_eng: The desire for happiness is a universal human emotion.
back.example_hindi: खुशी की इच्छा एक सार्वभौमिक मानवीय भावना है।

back.definition_eng: A person who lends money to people at unfairly high rates of interest.
back.example_eng: The poor farmer was trapped in debt to a ruthless usurer.
back.example_hindi: गरीब किसान एक निर्दयी सूदखोर के कर्ज में फंसा हुआ था।

back.definition_eng: A person who deliberately destroys/damages public property.
back.example_eng: A vandal spray-painted graffiti on the historic monument.
back.example_hindi: एक बर्बर ने ऐतिहासिक स्मारक पर भित्तिचित्र स्प्रे-पेंट कर दिया।

back.definition_eng: Impressive by reason of age; profoundly honoured.
back.example_eng: The venerable professor was respected by all his students.
back.example_hindi: सम्मानित प्रोफेसर का सभी छात्र सम्मान करते थे।

back.definition_eng: Habitually speaking the truth; precisely accurate.
back.example_eng: He was known to be a veracious witness whose testimony could be trusted.
back.example_hindi: वह एक सत्यप्रिय गवाह के रूप में जाना जाता था जिसकी गवाही पर भरोसा किया जा सकता था।

back.definition_eng: Exactly as spoken/written; word for word.
back.example_eng: The court reporter transcribed the testimony verbatim.
back.example_hindi: अदालत के रिपोर्टर ने गवाही को शब्द प्रति शब्द लिखा।

back.definition_eng: Using/containing more words than are needed.
back.example_eng: His verbose writing style made his articles difficult to read.
back.example_hindi: उनकी वाचाल लेखन शैली ने उनके लेखों को पढ़ना मुश्किल बना दिया।

back.definition_eng: Able to do many things.
back.example_eng: He is a versatile actor who can perform in both comedies and dramas.
back.example_hindi: वह एक बहुमुखी अभिनेता है जो कॉमेडी और ड्रामा दोनों में अभिनय कर सकता है।

back.definition_eng: A person who has a lot of experience in a particular area/activity.
back.example_eng: The company hired a veteran of the industry to lead the new project.
back.example_hindi: कंपनी ने नई परियोजना का नेतृत्व करने के लिए उद्योग के एक अनुभवी को काम पर रखा।

back.definition_eng: Someone who is dazzlingly skilled in any field; a musician who is a master of technique and artistry.
back.example_eng: The piano virtuoso received a standing ovation for his performance.
back.example_hindi: पियानो वादक को उसके प्रदर्शन के लिए खड़े होकर तालियाँ मिलीं।

back.definition_eng: A lot of bullets, stones, arrows etc. that are fired/ thrown at the same time.
back.example_eng: The soldiers fired a volley of shots at the enemy position.
back.example_hindi: सैनिकों ने दुश्मन की स्थिति पर गोलियों की बौछार कर दी।

back.definition_eng: Weak and easily hurt physically / emotionally.
back.example_eng: Young children are particularly vulnerable to diseases.
back.example_hindi: छोटे बच्चे विशेष रूप से बीमारियों की चपेट में आते हैं।

back.definition_eng: An arrangement of flowers and leaves (in a circle) placed on graves, worn on head/ hung on doors.
back.example_eng: They laid a wreath on the soldier's grave as a sign of respect.
back.example_hindi: उन्होंने सम्मान के प्रतीक के रूप में सैनिक की कब्र पर पुष्पांजलि अर्पित की।

back.definition_eng: A fear of people from other countries.
back.example_eng: Rising xenophobia in the country is a cause for great concern.
back.definition_hindi: विदेशी लोगों को न पसन्द करना
back.example_hindi: देश में बढ़ता विदेशी द्वेष बड़ी चिंता का कारण है।

back.definition_eng: A person who is fanatical and uncompromising in pursuit of their religious, political, or other ideals.
back.example_eng: The religious zealot refused to listen to any opposing views.
back.example_hindi: धार्मिक कट्टरपंथी ने किसी भी विरोधी विचार को सुनने से इनकार कर दिया।

back.definition_eng: The branch of biology that studies animals.
back.example_eng: Her love for animals led her to pursue a career in zoology.
back.example_hindi: जानवरों के प्रति उसके प्यार ने उसे प्राणि विज्ञान में करियर बनाने के लिए प्रेरित किया।
